title: Real Knife (Undertale)
description: Adds the Real Knife from Undertale featuring a custom 3D model, red sweep particles, original sounds, and 999999 damage. =)
body:
![BackGround](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9030069799d6f4a2e8f6eff3e7da6c77d79c554.png)

---

> *"Here we are!"*

Bring the ultimate weapon of destruction from Undertale straight into your Minecraft world. This isn't just a simple sword retexture; it's a carefully crafted mod designed for maximum satisfaction, nostalgia, and absolute power.

---

### ⚠️ **WORK IN PROGRESS: HOW TO OBTAIN**

> **Currently, the Real Knife is an endgame/god-tier item obtainable ONLY via the Creative Inventory (inside the Combat tab) or commands.** > Because this is such an iconic and overwhelmingly powerful weapon, I am still designing a balanced and worthy crafting recipe for it. The mod is actively in development, so stay tuned for future updates!
> **To get it now, use:**
> ```mcfunction
> /give @p undertale_real_knife:real_knife
> 
> ```
> 
> 

---

### ✨ **KEY FEATURES**

* 💥 **Absolute Power:** Deals an absurd **999999 damage**, instantly obliterating anything in your path.
* 🗡️ **Custom 3D Model:** A high-quality, pixel-perfect 3D representation of the Real Knife.
* 🩸 **Sinister Sweep Attack:** Features custom red sweep particle effects when attacking multiple enemies, true to the Genocide route.
* 🎵 **Immersive Audio:** Experience the classic Undertale slice sound effect with every swing.
* 💯 **Iconic Damage Indicator:** Displays the classic red "999999" pop-up floating above your target when you strike!

### 🤝 **SEAMLESS COMPATIBILITY**

The Real Knife is built to play nicely with the Fabric ecosystem out of the box:

* 🥊 **[Punchy!](https://modrinth.com/mod/punchy-fpa)** Native JSON support. Equip it to get smooth, dynamic first-person animations! *(Note: If using alongside Better Combat, ensure `"bettercombatCompat": true` is set in your Punchy config).*
* ⚔️ **[Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat):** Fully data-driven weapon attributes. The Real Knife acts as a "Dagger", executing lightning-fast attack animations and combos.
* 🍅 **[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric):** Features universal Fabric tags (`c:tools/knives`). Yes, you can legitimately use this weapon of mass destruction on a Cutting Board to slice your cabbages!

---

### ⚙️ **TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS**

| Specification | Details |
| --- | --- |
| **Minecraft Version** | `1.20.1` |
| **Mod Loader** | `Fabric` |
| **Dependencies** | `Fabric API` (Required) |

---

### ⚖️ **LICENSE & CREDITS**

* **Code & 3D Model:** All Rights Reserved by PHDev.
* **Textures & Sounds:** Inspired by and taken from *Undertale*, created by the legendary Toby Fox.

***Stay determined.*** ❤️

---
